situational_context: Running comeback day 51 (12 runs completed). Run #12 on June 21 was a significant overreach: 7.5 km vs 4 km planned (suffer 36). ACWR self-corrected from 1.35 to 1.21 over 9-day digest gap. HRV 7d avg 34 ms (down from 35), 2 consecutive UNBALANCED days at 32 ms — consistent with acute fatigue from run overreach + extreme heatwave (39-40C Paris). RHR stable at 50 bpm. Body battery hasn't reached 50 in 7 days (max 47) — chronic fatigue signal. VO2max running improved to 40.8. Weight rebounded +1.05 kg (102.62 to 103.67) — likely heat/hydration, body composition improved (muscle +1.16 kg, fat -0.17 kg). Hotel stay at Chantilly Jun 26-29 provides better outdoor training (forest trails, shade). No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest due July 2026.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Sortie velo — 60 min gravel/ebike Z1-Z2 (Foret de Chantilly)

recommendations.text: Run #13 tomorrow (Wed 24) is conditional on heat: if Paris hits 40C at noon, downgrade to 30 min walk in shade. If running, cap at 4 km and 122 bpm max. Carry 750+ mL water + electrolytes. Today's ebike commute was low-load (suffer 16), no gravel-adjustment needed.
recommendations.measurable: Run #13 executed at 4 km or less at FC 122 or less, or safely deferred to walk/rest if temp above 40C

recommendations.text: Body battery has not reached 50 in 7 days (max 47). Prioritize sleep quality and hydration — heat-induced dehydration suppresses both HRV and body battery. Target 2.5+ L water/day + electrolytes on sur site days and training days.
recommendations.measurable: Body battery at or above 50 at least 2 of next 7 days; HRV 7d avg at or above 35 ms

recommendations.text: Vitamin D retest due July 2026 (Dec 2025: 27 ng/mL insufficient, target 40+). Schedule blood panel before mid-July.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if body battery max stays below 50 for another 7 days
markers_to_watch.reason: 7 consecutive days without reaching 50 indicates chronic fatigue accumulation; may indicate need for deload

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 32 ms or fails to recover toward 36 ms over next 7 days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 34 ms (2 consecutive UNBALANCED days at 32); need reversal before increasing run volume

markers_to_watch.threshold: Monitor next Withings weigh-in — if weight above 104 kg, investigate hydration/nutrition
markers_to_watch.reason: Rebounded +1.05 kg in 2 weeks; likely heat/hydration but could indicate nutrition overshoot (fat intake 2x target)
